title: After the Asahi Hai F.S.: With Eyes Wide Open

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And we have a winner! A stunning victory for our
new junior champion! Finishing in second place
is...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(The sounds of pounding feet are still ringing in
my ears.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
("Thud, thud, thud"... As I charged to take the
lead, there were others right on my tail.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(But in that final moment, I felt sure that the one
crossing the finish line first... would be me.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The incredible times displayed up on the digital
scoreboard are far quicker than I had expected.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In other words, Ines Fujin couldn't afford to let
her guard down even for a moment. That also
meant she had no chance to conserve any energy.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Phew... Huff!
choice_data_list: Ines, you did great making it to the end!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Aha... Yeah... Thanks, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... I did it...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Aha... I'm okay. I just need to... catch my breath
for a minute...
choice_data_list: I'll bring a stretcher right away!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ahh... Hehe... Geez.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You're such a worrywart...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huff... My body's really hot... but the breeze feels nice...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe she managed to finish a G1 race
through sheer willpower. Now that's what I call a
unique competitor.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
It seems her body just couldn't keep up with her
spirit. Well, hmm... She's a bit rough around the
edges, but...

text_block_list.name: Girl with False Eyelashes
text_block_list.text: Wow. That was totally crazy! Ines is straight fire!

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
For real. She went wild out there. She ran until she
couldn't even stand anymore...

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Insane. She ran with everything she had, and it
looked like she was having a blast...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, Ryan, I wish we could have competed too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I feel the same way. I really wanted to race
today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I'll be the one flying over that finish
line.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
All right! Up and at 'em! Ines Fujin is back in
action!
choice_data_list: Are you sure you're all right?
Are you sure you're all right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, quit worrying so much! The infirmary
doctor just got angry at you for that, right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I just need a little rest, and I'll be good as new.
You're blowing things way out of proportion,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, now that the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes is
behind us, what's our next goal?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho is the first race of the Classic
Triple Crown. Based on today's performance, Ines
Fujin should have what it takes to compete there,
too.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh. Great response. That's my little trainer!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh. Great response. That's my little trainer!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Haha, don't sweat the small stuff! Let's do our
best to prepare for the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Goood morning!

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text: Oh, m-morning! So, um... Ines!

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
Ines, can you come around to the back for a
second?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Boss?
Sure, no problem!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: What's up?

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text: Ah, you're here. I'll get straight to the point.

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text: Are you sure you want to keep working here?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Erm, what do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
I saw you on TV the other day. Seems you put on
a great performance in the Asahi Hai F.S.

text_block_list.name: TV Celebrity
text_block_list.text:
"Next year's Classics should be a sight to behold!
There's an abundance of talented racers set to
compete, including the Mejiro family's rising star!"

text_block_list.name: Racing Critic
text_block_list.text:
"But that Ines Fujin... Don't you think it was a bit
early for her to be taking on a race like the Asahi
Hai?"

text_block_list.name: Racing Critic
text_block_list.text:
"She clearly needs to build more muscle, and her
core stability was lacking. If only she'd spent
more time preparing, she may have been able to
set a new record."

text_block_list.name: TV Celebrity
text_block_list.text:
"Oho... So put another way, you're saying that
with the right training, Ines Fujin will be
unstoppable?"

text_block_list.name: Racing Critic
text_block_list.text:
"Well, she's definitely got the talent to do great
things."

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
I did a little digging online, and apparently that
critic is really harsh. Getting praised the way you
did is a big deal!

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
And that got me thinking. It's not just your
trainer—everyone in the racing scene has high
hopes for you.

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
What do you think about taking a break from
working here next year? I'll keep you on the
books, so you can always come back.

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
I know you've got your family to think about...
But if you ever need anything, no matter how
small, I'm always here to listen.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: People have high hopes for me, huh...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Things have gotten all complicated all of a
sudden.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: (I'd like to continue working if possible.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(Even if it's just for peace of mind, I want to give
a little back to my family for letting me come
here to pursue my dream.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(And in that same way, I want my little sisters to
be able to chase their dreams, too.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(If I can create even a bit more leeway for my
family, then I'd like to do what I can to help out.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But I know everyone's concerned about what's
best for me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Most of the other students are able to devote all
of their focus to racing. And that might start to
matter more as I compete on bigger stages...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what Trainer really thinks about all the
part-time work I'm doing...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
They'd probably prefer it if I focused all my
efforts on winning the Satsuki Sho, huh...
